title: pelargonium × metallicum
intro: Pelargonium × metallicum, also known as Mountain Rose or Red Tip, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive red-tipped leaves and clusters of small, pink flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils, particularly geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × metallicum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, sore throats, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
